name: Macaroni and Vegetables with Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 ounces Red-fat Cheddar cheese, shredded and divided
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwavable casserole, combine margarine and garlic. Microwave on HIGH for 30 seconds until margarine is melted.
2. In a 1-cup liquid measure, combine milk, flour, and salt, stirring to dissolve the flour.
3. Using a wire whisk, stir into the margarine-garlic mixture. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 1 minute.
4. Stir in 2 ounces cheese and the Worcestershire sauce. Microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes until the mixture thickens.
5. Add macaroni, broccoli, and cauliflower to the cheese sauce and stir to coat. Microwave on Medium-High (70%) for 2 minutes until thoroughly heated.
6. Top with remaining cheese. Microwave on HIGH for 30 seconds until cheese is melted.
